zh.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Oxton於1196年出生在英國爾貝比頓時，她的父親Ranulph de Oxton22歲，母親Agnes de Longville23歲。她於1210年與Hugh de Venables在英國爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1277年在英國爾金德頓享年81歲，埋葬在英國爾洛斯黑爾。

zh-hans.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Oxton于1196年出生在英国爾貝比頓时，她的父亲Ranulph de Oxton22岁，母亲Agnes de Longville23岁。她于1210年与Hugh de Venables在英国爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1277年在英国爾金德頓享年81岁，埋葬在英国爾洛斯黑爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Oxton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called Oxton, such as those in Yorkshire, Cheshire, and Nottinghamshire, which are named with Old English oxa ‘ox’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Oxton was born in 1196, in Bebington, Cheshire, England, her father, Ranulph de Oxton, was 22 and her mother, Agnes de Longville, was 23. She married Hugh de Venables in 1210, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1277, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Rostherne, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Oxton est née en 1196, à Bebington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph de Oxton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Longville, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Venables en 1210, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1277, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Rostherne, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Oxton 1196 in Bebington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulph de Oxton 22 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Longville 23. Sie hat 1210 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England Hugh de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1277 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Kinderton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Rostherne, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Oxton è nata il nel 1196 nel Bebington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Ranulph de Oxton, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Longville, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Venables nel 1210, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1277, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Rostherne, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Oxtonが1196年にイギリスチェシュアイアベビントンで生まれた時，父Ranulph de Oxtonは22歳，母Agnes de Longvilleは23歳であった。1210年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでHugh de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1277年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで81歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアロススエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Oxton(이)가 1196년 영국 체실르 베빙턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulph de Oxton(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Longville(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1210년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 Hugh de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1277년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 로스더니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Oxton nasceu em 1196, em Bebington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph de Oxton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Longville, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Venables em 1210, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1277, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Rostherne, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Oxton родилась в 1196 г. в местности бебингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ranulph de Oxton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Longville, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Venables в 1210 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1277 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности ростирн, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Oxton nació en 1196, en Bebington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph de Oxton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Agnes de Longville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Hugh de Venables en 1210, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1277, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Rostherne, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
